---
name: "False positive — my real voice was flagged"
about: A genuinely real voice was scored as likely synthetic (or vice-versa)
title: "[false-positive] "
labels: false-positive, accuracy
---

> Voice Truthgate is a **signal, not a verdict** — it is expected to be wrong sometimes,
> in both directions. These reports are genuinely useful for calibration. Thank you.

**Which way did it get it wrong?**
- [ ] A **real** voice was scored **Likely synthetic** (false positive)
- [ ] A **synthetic/cloned** voice was scored **Likely authentic** (false negative)

**What band + score did you get?**
e.g. "🔴 Likely synthetic, score 0.78"

**Which check?**
- [ ] Stage 1 (instant heuristic, default)
- [ ] Stage 2 (the opt-in stronger AI model)

**About the clip (no need to share the audio)**
- Approx length:
- Recording source / device:
- Codec or compression, if known (phone call, Zoom, WhatsApp, uploaded WAV/MP3…):
- Language / accent:
- Background noise? Emotional/distressed speech?

**Anything else**
Context that might explain it (heavy compression, very short clip, etc.).
